_comment_purpose: 2026-05-23 ship per team-distribution-roadmap Phase 5+ auto-update propagation:Renovate 自動開 PR when @qijenchen/design-system / @qijenchen/storybook-config 有新版,team 看 PR diff + storybook preview deploy + audit pipeline 全綠 → merge

packageRules._comment: DS 內部 packages 走 grouped PR(每週一次 batch)+ 自動 approve patch + minor 等 team review

patch._comment_future: 穩定後可開 automerge: true 給 patch 走

major._comment: Major bump 必走 codemod + 多人 review,絕不 automerge

packageRules._comment: Pre-release tags(@beta / @next)— consumer 可選擇試版
